idea-plugin.name: Claudete Commit Message
idea-plugin.description:
Write better Git commit messages in one click — right inside your JetBrains IDE, powered by the Claude Code CLI.

Check the files you're about to commit, click the Claude button in the commit‑message toolbar (or press Ctrl+Alt+K), and a clean, conventional commit message is written straight into the message field. The plugin builds a diff of exactly the changes you selected, sends it to claude, and fills in the result — in the background and cancelable at any time.

✨ Highlights

  • One click, right where you commit — the action lives in the commit‑message toolbar.
  • Conventional Commits by default, with a fully editable prompt.
  • Cancelable — the icon turns into a red stop square while generating; click it to abort.
  • Selection‑aware — includes checked unversioned files as new‑file diffs; the button is enabled only when files are selected.
  • WSL‑friendly — run the CLI inside WSL from a native‑Windows IDE, with a distro picker.
  • Model picker — Claude aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku, fable) or a full model name.
  • Painless setup — auto‑detect the claude executable and run a built‑in integration test from Settings.

🚀 Getting started

  1. Install and authenticate the Claude Code CLI (run claude once in a terminal).
  2. Open Settings → Tools → Claudete Commit Message, click Detect, then Test integration.
  3. In the Commit tool window, select files and click the Claude button (or Ctrl+Alt+K).

Requirements: the Claude Code CLI installed and authenticated. Works with PhpStorm, PyCharm, IntelliJ IDEA, and other IntelliJ‑based IDEs.

Privacy: when you generate a message, the diff of your selected changes is sent to Anthropic through your own Claude Code CLI and authentication. The plugin itself collects no telemetry. This plugin is an independent integration and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.2

  • Replaced the deprecated ReadAction.compute API with a cancellable non‑blocking read action, for compatibility with 2026.1+.

0.1.1

  • All UI, status, and notification messages are now in English.
  • The message field is cleared when a new generation starts, so no stale text remains.

0.1.0

  • Generate commit messages from the selected files using the Claude Code CLI.
  • Toolbar button and Ctrl+Alt+K shortcut; cancelable stop toggle.
  • WSL mode with distro picker; model picker; executable auto‑detection; built‑in integration test.
  • Includes unversioned files; the action is enabled only when files are selected.

action.description: Generate a commit message from the selected files using the Claude Code CLI
